name: Healing
summary: Servants of life-aspected deities. The Healing domain emphasizes restoration and protection.

granted_power_l1.name: Rebuke Death
granted_power_l1.summary: Standard action, melee touch on a living creature; heals 1d4 + 1/2 caster level (min 1) to a creature at 0 or fewer HP. Usable 3 + Wis modifier times per day.

higher_level_powers.summary: All cure spells cast as if maximized (no slot cost increase).
